mortal.name: Mortal / Origin
mortal.description: Ordinary humans or Scions before divine inheritance fully awakens—lives are still largely shaped by mortal skills and Paths.
mortal.mechanicalEffects: Six-step Origin character creation (concept through finishing touches) on pp. 94–99: Paths grant Skills with 3/2/1 prioritization; Attributes use 6/4/2 distribution per Arena on top of 1 dot each, then Favored Approach +2 to each Attribute in that Approach (max 5, overflow stays in Arena); one Calling and one active Mortal Knack at a time unless extras purchased (full Knack text: Pandora’s Box); five finishing Skill dots, one Attribute dot, two Knacks or four Birthright points (Birthrights: Pandora’s Box first, Origin p. 99 / Hero p. 201 cross-reference). Defense from Resilience Attributes; Injury track with extra Bruised from Stamina; record movement (Athletics + higher of Might or Dexterity).
mortal.purviewsOriginNote: Patron Purview picks are part of Hero (post-Visitation) chargen, not Origin Mortal creation. Pantheon and divine parent here still drive Society Path Asset Skills and story (Origin p. 97). Appendix 2 lists each deity’s patron Purviews for when you advance to Hero on Review.

hero.name: Hero
hero.description: Visitation has happened: mythic power is real on the streets, but the Scion is still learning what divinity demands.
hero.mechanicalEffects: Nine-step Hero chargen (concept through finishing touches): Scion: Hero for Visitation *procedure* and step order; Pandora’s Box (Revised) as the primary reference for Purviews, Birthrights, Boons, and the Knack compendium. Use this wizard’s shared steps where they overlap, then confirm limits at the table.
hero.purviewsChargenNote: Hero: one innate Purview from your divine parent’s list (Paths) plus your pantheon’s Signature Purview (data: pantheons.json signaturePurviewId). Full Innate and Boon write-ups: Pandora’s Box (Revised). At Demigod+ you can add other Purviews (e.g. from Relics) — confirm with your Storyguide.
hero.source: Scion_Hero_(Final_Download).pdf (Visitation / chargen flow); SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf (Purviews, Boons, Knacks, Birthrights)

demigod.name: Demigod
demigod.description: World-shaking power with one foot still in mortal stories—Dominion-scale play opens.
demigod.mechanicalEffects: Follow Scion: Demigod chargen and advancement; this app’s JSON can be extended with Demigod-only Knacks/Boons entries.
demigod.purviewsChargenNote: Demigod play continues Purviews and Birthrights from Hero; use Pandora’s Box (Revised) first for Boon ladders and Purview limits, then Scion: Demigod for tier-specific rules. This app keeps four patron Purview slots from your parent’s list unless your table expands them.

god.name: God
god.description: Near-fully divine actors shaping pantheons and cosmology.
god.mechanicalEffects: Follow Scion: God character creation and mantle rules; extend data JSON with God-tier options as needed.
god.purviewsChargenNote: God-tier characters: Pandora’s Box (Revised) for Mantles, Purviews, and Boon ladders; Scion: God for tier-specific rules. This app still uses four patron Purview slots from the parent list as a chargen default — confirm with your Storyguide.

sorcerer.name: Sorcerer
sorcerer.description: Mortals who wield learned magic, pacts, or sorcerous paths outside classic divine bloodlines.
sorcerer.mechanicalEffects: Saints & Monsters Ch. 3: Motif, Sources of Power, Invocation, Patronage, Prohibition, Talisman, and the Magic Purview (merged into this app’s Purviews/Boons from supplemental data). Paths and Callings still model story hooks; confirm dot budgets and Marvel limits with the PDF.
sorcerer.purviewsChargenNote: Sorcerers: track the Magic Purview and any other Purviews your table grants (Relics, Denizen hooks, etc.). Patron Purview slots from a divine parent are not used unless your chronicle blends sorcery with Scion lineage.

titanic.name: Titanic Scion
titanic.alsoKnownAs: Titan-blooded Hero-tier Scion (Saints & Monsters + Titans Rising)
titanic.description: Scions whose nature skews toward Titanic Callings and Maelstrom Hearts—Epicenters replace standard universal Purview Innates while the bond is unsuppressed. Use Patron type “Titan” on Paths with titans from Titanomachy data.
titanic.mechanicalEffects: Follow Titans Rising ch. 1 with Saints & Monsters as the mechanical hub: at least one Titanic Calling among your three Visitation rows, universal Purviews with Epicenter text (bundle.epicenters), Maelstrom Hearts, Collateral or Tension alternates, and Titanic Mutations (wizard Titanic extras step). Extra Titanic Knacks from Titans Rising merge as tr_* in Knacks.
titanic.purviewsChargenNote: Titanic: each universal Purview you take uses Epicenter summaries from Saints & Monsters (bundle.epicenters) in place of the usual Innate until you imbue Legend to suppress Epicenter effects (see PDF). Patron Purview picks follow your Titan or God parent’s list from the data (Paths).
